title: Joins
description: Operasi JOIN untuk menggabungkan data dari beberapa tabel di MySQL.

commands.name: INNER JOIN
commands.title: Inner Join
commands.description: Mengembalikan baris yang memiliki kecocokan di kedua tabel.
commands.syntax: SELECT ... FROM tabel1 INNER JOIN tabel2 ON tabel1.col = tabel2.col;
commands.examples:
SELECT u.username, o.id AS order_id, o.total
FROM users u
INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id;

SELECT p.name, c.name AS category
FROM products p
INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
WHERE p.price > 100000;

commands.name: LEFT JOIN
commands.title: Left Join
commands.description: Semua baris dari tabel kiri + kecocokan dari tabel kanan (NULL jika tidak cocok).
commands.syntax: SELECT ... FROM tabel1 LEFT JOIN tabel2 ON tabel1.col = tabel2.col;
commands.examples:
SELECT u.username, COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
GROUP BY u.id;

-- User tanpa order
SELECT u.username
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE o.id IS NULL;

commands.name: RIGHT JOIN
commands.title: Right Join
commands.description: Semua baris dari tabel kanan + kecocokan dari tabel kiri.
commands.syntax: SELECT ... FROM tabel1 RIGHT JOIN tabel2 ON tabel1.col = tabel2.col;
commands.notes: RIGHT JOIN jarang digunakan — biasanya bisa ditulis ulang sebagai LEFT JOIN dengan urutan tabel dibalik.

commands.name: CROSS JOIN
commands.title: Cross Join
commands.description: Menggabungkan setiap baris dari tabel1 dengan setiap baris dari tabel2 (Cartesian product).
commands.syntax: SELECT ... FROM tabel1 CROSS JOIN tabel2;
commands.notes: Hati-hati: hasilnya = jumlah baris tabel1 × jumlah baris tabel2.

commands.name: SELF JOIN
commands.title: Self Join
commands.syntax: SELECT ... FROM tabel t1 JOIN tabel t2 ON t1.col = t2.col;
commands.examples:
-- Karyawan dan manajernya
SELECT e.name AS employee, m.name AS manager
FROM employees e
LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.manager_id = m.id;

-- Cari duplikat email
SELECT a.id, a.email
FROM users a
JOIN users b ON a.email = b.email AND a.id < b.id;

commands.name: MULTI JOIN
commands.title: Multiple Joins
commands.syntax: SELECT ... FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON ... JOIN t3 ON ...;
commands.examples:
SELECT o.id, u.username, p.name, oi.quantity, oi.price
FROM orders o
JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;
